aeo_readiness.summary: The website has basic AEO elements in place, such as relevant content and schema markup, but lacks depth in content optimization, user engagement, and review generation.
quick_wins: Implement a strategy to generate Google reviews to improve credibility and local search presence.
Expand content to include detailed service descriptions, customer testimonials, and location-specific keywords.
Optimize meta tags and headers with targeted keywords to improve search engine visibility.

gbp_analysis.found: The website has Google Business Profile (GBP) elements such as location-specific landing pages and contact information.
gbp_analysis.summary: While the website includes some GBP elements, it lacks a dedicated Google Business Profile, which is crucial for local search visibility and customer engagement.
critical_issues: Lack of customer reviews and ratings on Google.
Insufficient local content targeting Minneapolis, MN.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone) information on its website, but lacks citations across major directories and local listings.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories such as Yelp, Bing Places, and Yellow Pages.
Ensure consistent NAP information across all online platforms and directories.
Encourage customers to leave reviews on these directories to boost local search presence.

schema_gaps: No LocalBusiness schema with detailed address and service area information
No Review schema to showcase customer testimonials

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of a dedicated Google Business Profile and customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local search users and potential customers searching for plumbing and HVAC services in Minneapolis, MN.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a Google Business Profile and generating initial customer reviews.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, location-specific content and building backlinks from local business directories and industry-related websites.

page_title: Keep your family comfortable with trusted furnace repair in Minneapolis, MN
